title: Custom Coatings for Exterior Surfaces - Elite South Texas
content:
Exterior Commercial Surfaces
Commercial surfaces require durable and long-lasting performance in parks and public spaces. These exterior coatings must withstand high traffic and extreme weather conditions, including abuse from heavy snow removal equipment and de-icing chemicals and salts. These finishes also maintain color and appearance despite being exposed to extreme UV.
Advantages
Ideal for new or existing concrete
High durability and abrasion resistance; withstands heavy traffic and machinery
Unlimited design, color and texture options
Easier to clean and maintain than plain concrete
Withstands extreme heat, freeze/thaw conditions, deicing salts and chemicals
UV stable
Slip resistant with adjustable coefficient of friction ranges
Chemical and stain resistant
Cost-effective compared to full depth stamped concrete and other decorative finishes
Quick install, less downtime
Pool decks & waterparks
Restaurants and bars
Concourses
Car parking decks
Porticos, patios & sidewalks
Theme parks & attractions
